schema_name: MME-ScalpX Lane E Candidate Materialization Intake Contract
d39_status_validation_rule: D39 proof must be PASS and no-execution safe. If D39 package_status is not top-level, D39 status is validated through the D40 freeze-summary D39 row.
pre_materialization_safety_requirements: no runtime service start in D2
no broker API call in D2
no live Redis write in D2
no real result-pack creation in D2
no ML training or prediction in D2
future_lane_e_acceptance_requirements: D1 subset manifest exists and validates required selected-candidate fields
each selected candidate maps back to D37/D39/D40 handoff lineage
candidate fingerprint matches selected candidate manifest
planned result-pack root is candidate-scoped under run/replay_optimization/candidate_replays/
Lane E records replay runner version, code hashes, input hashes, and command provenance
Lane E writes materialization_preflight_safety_report.json before any execution
Lane E writes materialization_execution_manifest.json after permitted materialization
Lane E writes materialization_acceptance_report.json after artifact audit
no labels are bound unless candidate_label_binding_precondition.json passes against real materialized artifacts
no ML dataset export is produced unless verified labels exist
no production profitability claim is made from materialization or intake artifacts
lane_c_stop_rule: If materialization depends on replay runner behavior, bin/replay_run.py, staging compatibility, or any Lane C-owned replay-runner seam, Lane E must stop and wait for current Lane C proof before execution.
